title: Apply for National Summer Camp Programme
description: Apply for the National Summer Camp Programme for your child.

config.subject: Your National Summer Camp Programme application has been received

steps.title: Choose camp preferences
steps.description:
Choose up to 3 camp preferences for the child.

You only need to choose one. Choosing more than one may give the child more options.

You may not get a place in any of these camps. The Ministry will contact you about the next steps.

required.error: Select a first choice camp type

options.label: Bank Hall Church of the Nazarene
St. Clair Hall and George Brathwaite Pavilion

required.error: Select a first choice General Summer Camp location
Select a first choice Cultural Arts Camp location

overrides.label: Do you want to add a second choice?

required.error: Select a second choice camp type

options.label: Bank Hall Church of the Nazarene
St. Clair Hall and George Brathwaite Pavilion

required.error: Select a second choice General Summer Camp location
Select a second choice Cultural Arts Camp location

overrides.label: Do you want to add a third choice?

required.error: Select a third choice camp type

options.label: Bank Hall Church of the Nazarene
St. Clair Hall and George Brathwaite Pavilion

required.error: Select a third choice General Summer Camp location
Select a third choice Cultural Arts Camp location

steps.title: What is the child's date of birth?

overrides.hint: We use this to check if the child can attend the camps you choose. For example, 27 03 2015.
overrides.label: Child's date of birth

max.error: The child must be 15 years old or younger

min.error: The child must be at least 4 years old

steps.description: Give details for another adult we can contact if we cannot reach you.

steps.title: Can camp staff get medical help for the child in an emergency?
steps.description: In an emergency, camp staff may need to give first aid, call a doctor or take the child for emergency care.

overrides.label: Can camp staff get medical help for the child in an emergency?
Tell us what camp staff should do in an emergency

required.error: Enter what camp staff should do in an emergency

steps.title: Can the child take part in all camp activities?

overrides.label: Can the child take part in all camp activities?

options.label: No, the child must not take part in some activities

required.error: Enter which activities the child should not take part in

steps.title: Can the Ministry take photos or videos of the child during camp activities?
steps.description: Photos or videos may be used to show National Summer Camp Programme activities.

steps.title: Check your answers
steps.description: Check your answers before you send your application.

options.label:
I declare that:

* the information I gave is correct
* I am the child's parent or guardian
* I understand the information may be checked
* I have read the camp rules
* I have talked with the child about the camp rules
* I understand applying does not mean the child has a place at camp
* I understand the child may have to leave camp if they break the camp rules or put anyone at risk

required.error: You must confirm before submitting the application
